_comment: Weld variant (9a-adjacent): split cube edge 0 (v_0 ↔ v_3) at midpoint, then bevel ONLY the half near v_0. The midpoint vertex has valence=2 with selCount=1 — non-bev half-edge ends at the midpoint. Expected fail until valence=2 endpoint handling is added — currently vibe3d under-counts both verts and faces (12/8 vs Blender's 14/10) at the midpoint side.
